bio: Hello! I'm Archie Paice, a passionate developer and student with a love for building things that live on the internet. I enjoy turning ideas into reality through clean code and thoughtful design.
When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring new technologies, contributing to open-source projects, and pushing the boundaries of what's possible.
